title: psithyrisma
side_effects: Psithyrisma can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to its high concentration of alkaloids. In severe cases, prolonged use can lead to respiratory problems, irregular heartbeats, and even temporary blindness. Some individuals have also reported experiencing vivid nightmares and mood swings after ingesting the plant's extracts. It is essential to use psithyrisma under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional to minimize the risk of adverse reactions.
